seo.title: Checkout | Davinto Store
seo.description: Complete your Davinto order with delivery across Egypt.

headerDescription: Add delivery details, choose how you want to pay, and review the final edit before placing your order.
emptyDescription: Add products to your cart before starting checkout.
noPayments: No payment methods are enabled from admin settings.
paymobMissing: Setup required. Paymob keys are not added yet.
codDescription: Pay in cash when your Davinto order arrives. No transaction reference or screenshot is required.
vodafoneMissing: Vodafone Cash number not added yet
paymentProofHint: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP screenshot. Max size 5MB.
secureCardDescription: After placing the order, you will be redirected to the secure Paymob card payment page.
verificationNote: Final price, offers, bundles, discount code, delivery, and stock are verified by the backend before the order is confirmed.

errors.trackingMissing: Order was created, but tracking details were missing.
errors.paymentOpen: Order was created, but Visa payment could not be opened. Please contact the store with your order number.
errors.create: Failed to create order. Please try again.
errors.discountNotApplied: This discount code did not apply to this cart.
errors.discount: Discount code could not be applied.
errors.quote: Checkout totals could not be calculated.
errors.quoteLoading: Checkout totals are still loading. Please try again in a moment.
errors.name: Full name is required.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.paymob: Visa / Mastercard payment is not configured yet. Please choose another payment method.
errors.reference: Transaction reference is required for this payment method.
errors.proofRequired: Transaction screenshot is required for this payment method.
errors.proofType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP screenshots are allowed.
errors.proofSize: Screenshot is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
errors.discountFirst: Apply the discount code first or remove it before placing the order.
